title: License Check Executor Schema
description: Verify embedded license notices in built artifacts

files.description: Paths to files whose embedded license notices must be verified (relative to project root)

licenses.description: License entries to verify; field values are matched verbatim (regex metacharacters are escaped automatically)

name.description: Human-readable library description; appears in error messages and is matched verbatim in the bundle

homepageUrl.description: Library homepage URL embedded in the license notice

copyright.description: Copyright line embedded in the license notice

licenseType.description: License-type line embedded in the license notice

licenseUrl.description: License-text URL embedded in the license notice
